impact: This gives the supervisor a deterministic recovery policy after repeated Python and TypeScript compile failures: classify syntax failures separately, force smaller proposals, require changed-file syntax checks before full validation, and avoid broad contract rewrites until the daemon is producing syntactically valid patches again.
summary: Add supervisor repair guidance for syntax-failure recovery in PP&D daemon cycles.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
